articles.title: Ancient DNA reveals the mysterious collapse of Europe's megalith builders

articles.title: Special relativity can warp chemical bonds – now we've seen it happen
articles.summary: An experiment with a charged molecule of bismuth and carbon reveals how effects from Albert Einstein’s special relativity reshape the standard understanding of chemical bonds

articles.title: This common pesticide may be quietly wiping out future bumblebees

articles.title: SpaceX wants to launch 100,000 Starlink satellites to orbit
articles.summary: SpaceX has applied for approval to operate a 100,000-member megaconstellation of next-gen Starlink satellites in Earth orbit. And each of the new spacecraft will weigh about 4,400 pounds.

articles.title: Japanese company books 1,100 pounds of cargo space on SpaceX Starship mission to the moon

articles.title: A worm that lived half a billion years ago preferred turning right
articles.summary: Fossils of Spriggina floundersi provide the earliest evidence of animals favouring one side of the body over the other – a feature of nervous systems that we see in our own right- and left-handedness

articles.title: New Jurassic dinosaur species identified in Thailand from a single bone

articles.title: Assessing lab animals with AI
articles.summary: Rutgers Office for Research (OfR) leaders collaborated with researchers around the world to develop an artificial intelligence (AI) program that has the potential to revolutionize lab research.

articles.title: Where Venezuela’s Earthquakes Shifted the Ground

articles.title: New model maps solar storms across 1 million miles around Earth
articles.summary: A team at the Applied Physics Lab is working to understand the complex science behind predicting invisible threats that can quickly cripple electric grid infrastructure on Earth.

articles.title: Super Typhoon Bavi
